texto: The Bush and Obama administrations have repeatedly said that America is not at war with Islam. And Republicans need to be vocal about condemning anyone, in America or abroad, who seeks to lump all Muslims together as America's enemies. America is not at war with Islam, and Republicans must continue to follow President Bush's example in condemning any expressions of prejudice against Muslims.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Margaret Hoover sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The Bush and Obama administrations have repeatedly said that America is not at war with Islam. An…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, political, america, útil em momentos de estudos e viagem.
